description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic and in Arabic script. People include: Abū l-ʿAlā'; the Amir Bayraq Najā(?) (bayraq seems to be a Turkic word for a battle standard); Ibn Bāzil; ʿAllūn b. [...]; al-Anṣārī al-Bazzāz; Sulaymān b. Bishr; Ibn Baḥr; Abū Sahl; Ibrāhīm; Ibn Kohen; Ghālib.Sometimes lists brokerage fees (juʿl). The numbers seem large.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
